subject: Standardized Config for VFC
commit_message:
Standardized Config for VFC

Change-Id: Ie7064b59032c6cd81ee37466c89a5dee74530939
Issue-ID: OOM-750
Signed-off-by: Mike Elliott <mike.elliott@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

need to add one component: vfc_multivimproxy
the docker image version is: onap/vfc/multivimproxy: 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT-latest
the port is 8481
need environment MSB_ADDR

Patch Set 1:

(16 comments)

As you may have noticed, I have removed NodePorts from the helm charts. NodePorts are only needed if it is necessary to communicate with an ONAP component from outside the K8s cluster. All ONAP components that are deployed within k8s can communicate with each other using the ports defined as service.externalPort in the service section of the values.yaml files.
Having said that, are there any of the main VFC components that you think should expose a NodePort?
